---
title: "journal"
author: "Hayden Simm"
date: "2026-03-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

We are deciding to work in the tidyverse, so we loading in the data using "read_csv" 

plan to do a MANOVA to determine the relationship between dose and the responses:
survival, hatch, and abnormalities?- count data

should we do the pairwise comparisons with the behaviour data?- continuous data
